steps.title: Use the matching numerator
steps.content:
The equation has the same numerator over two different denominators:
$$\frac{x+8}{4}=\frac{x+8}{15}$$
This can be true only if the shared numerator is $0$.

steps.title: Find the interval
steps.content: So $x+8=0$. The value $0$ is between $-3$ and $3$. The answer is B.
